name: DeepFace
pricing_notes: Open source (MIT); no API costs; GPU recommended for batch processing

performance.notes: 100-500ms per face for verification on CPU; faster on GPU

agent_readiness.notes: Lightweight Python face recognition framework. Face verification (same person?), recognition (who is this?), analysis (age, gender, emotion, ethnicity). Wraps multiple backends: VGG-Face, FaceNet, OpenFace, DeepFace, DeepID, ArcFace, SFace. Simple one-line API. No need to choose model — framework handles it. Used for access control, photo organization, demographic analysis.

gotchas: Face recognition is privacy-sensitive — GDPR/legal compliance required
Low-quality images or unusual angles reduce accuracy
Demographic analysis (ethnicity) is ethically fraught — use with extreme care
best_when: Face verification for authentication (is this the same person?)
Rapid face recognition prototyping without choosing a model
avoid_when: Production biometric systems (use dedicated enterprise solutions with proper auditing)
Any application without clear consent and privacy disclosure
summary: DeepFace is a lightweight Python framework for face recognition and analysis. One-line API for face verification, recognition, and analysis (age, gender, emotion). Wraps multiple backends (ArcFace, FaceNet, VGG-Face). No model selection needed. Used for authentication, photo organization, and demographic analysis. Privacy-sensitive — requires GDPR compliance and clear user consent.
